hook_en: Why are blueberries a superfood? Let me show you!
hook_es: ¿Por qué son los arándanos un superalimento? ¡Déjame mostrarte!
key_message: Blueberries have the highest antioxidant content among common fruits. Learn how to select and use them!
visual_elements: Close-up shot of fresh and frozen blueberries in bowls
Comparison of ORAC scores of various fruits on screen
Quick prep tips for using blueberries in smoothies and salads
_source_food_context: • INGREDIENT: Blueberries — Among the highest antioxidant content of any common fruit (ORAC score) (Tip: Frozen blueberries retain nearly all nutrients and are cheaper year-round)

title_en: Get the Most Out of Blueberries!
hook_en: Frozen or fresh? Which blueberry is best? Let's find out!
hook_es: ¿Congelados o frescos? ¿Cuál es mejor? ¡Vamos a descubrirlo!
key_message: Frozen blueberries retain nearly all nutrients and are a cost-effective option year-round.
visual_elements: Side-by-side of fresh vs. frozen blueberries
Demonstration of using frozen blueberries in a recipe
_source_food_context: • INGREDIENT: Blueberries — Among the highest antioxidant content of any common fruit (ORAC score) (Tip: Frozen blueberries retain nearly all nutrients and are cheaper year-round)
